title: Google forms
excerpt: Hi, Im new here, is there a way i can connect my google form responses to monday.com form or with any board? TIA!

posts.author: Iamgale19 (Gale)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, Im new here, is there a way i can connect my google form responses to monday.com form or with any board? TIA!

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Iamgale19

Nachliel from Easyapps here

You can integrate google forms with monday using Zapier, see here.

Regardless, if you are interested in creating styled forms that better match your brand and embed perfectly in you web page you can check out our monday.com app Easyform and our extensive documentation site.

You can set up a free demo here or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.

Here is an example of our form in action:

I hope this helps

Nachliel

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Iamgale19

We developed an app called Google Forms Integration Plus that allows getting responses from Google Forms directly monday.com.
Google Forms is free to use and has advanced capabilities that are missing in monday’s forms, and our app offers more flexible and robust logic. It basically solves all the gaps in monday’s forms.

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - Google Forms Integration Plus - monday.com App Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: LWRidler1 (Lance Ridl)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi I am battling to connect my google form via “this form” in you app can you help

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
@LWRidler1 can you try now? we had a slight issue that was fixed.

Sorry for the late response.

posts.author: fdm_va (Francine)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Fantasy-Media-Team I tried using Google Forms Integration Plus, but it’s not working on my end. The responses from the Google Form won’t transfer on my Monday board. What seems to be the problem?

posts.author: Rogerswatson (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml: We have the same issue, The dropdown menu cant find any of our forms so we cant connect them

posts.author: Kofi (Kofi FiftyTechSolutions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Rogerswatson @fdm_va @LWRidler1

Sounds like you are all having a nightmare.

Instead of messing about with clunky, restrictive apps, I would use this free integration tool, similar, but better than Zapier.

You can then easily automate your responses into monday, or any other place you would like!

I would output the forms into my CRM, and push to chatGPT to get generate automated responses or next steps.

Feel free to reply here or contact me directly at contact@FiftyTechSolutions.com if you have any questions!

Kofi
